title: MikroTik RouterBOARD RBmAPL-2nD, mAP lite
description: RBmAPL-2nD is the smallest wireless Access Point with full RouterOS support and a built-in 2.4GHz radio part with support for 802.11b/g/n standards. The whole device is barely bigger than a matchbox and a special ethernet port was used to make it RBmAPL-2nD is an excellent device suitable as a travel router to create a WiFi hotspot or as a client device to increase the range of your mobile devices The router comes with a built-in magnet , thanks to which it will stick to any iron surface - useful when configuring MikroTik servers with your mobile phone/tablet. In the case of non-metallic material, a double-sided sticker is also included in the package Any type of PoE - passive 10 - 60 V and 802.3at Integrated 802.1b/g/n wireless card MicroUSB for power supply via USB (5 to 10 V) L4 license suitable for AP or client 1Ã 10/100Mbps LAN
